title: Excise taxes and other levies forms - Canada.ca
content:
## Excise taxes and other levies forms
These forms can be used to provide information about excise taxes and tax on insurance premiums under the Excise Tax Act .
- Tax on insurance premiums
- B200 Excise Tax Return
- B268 Notification of Fiscal Months
- B284 Election or Revocation of the Election for Semi-Annual Reporting
- E412 Notice of Revocation of Waiver
- E413 Notice of Objection (Excise Tax Act)
- E414 Notice of Objection – Purchaser
- E432 Assignment of Rights to Object or Appeal Under the Excise Tax Act
- E447 Wholesaler's Bond – Excise Taxes
- L15 Application for Licence under the Provisions of the Excise Tax Act
- N15 Excise Tax Application for Refund
- N15-1 Excise Tax Application for Refund Supplementary Information
- RC230 Federal Excise Tax Exemption Certificate for Goods Purchased by a Province
- RC234 Election or Revocation of an Election to Allow a Dealer to Claim Refunds of Federal Excise Tax on Goods Purchased or Imported by a Province
- RC565 Federal Excise Tax Exemption Certificate for Immediate Export of Fuel
- XE8 Excise Tax Act – Application for Refund of Federal Excise Tax on Gasoline

## Tax on insurance premiums
- B241 Excise Tax Return – Broker
- B243 Tax on Insurance Premiums Return – Insured
- E638 Application for Exemption from Tax on Insurance Premiums Imposed Under Part I of the Excise Tax Act
- E638A Statement of Availability or Declination from Authorized Insurers – Tax on Insurance Premiums under Part I of the Excise Tax Act

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
